name: Morpheus, Corruptor of the Castle of Dreams
desc: 2 monsters, including a "Castle of Dreams" Spellcaster monster. If this card is Link Summoned: Set 2 "Castle of Dreams" Traps from your Deck, GY and/or banishment to your field. (Quick Effect): You can Tribute this card, then Special Summon 2 non-Link "Castle of Dreams" monsters from your hand, GY and/or banishment. You can only use 1 effect of "Morpheus, Corruptor of the Castle of Dreams" per turn, and only once that turn.
strings: Set 2 Castle of Dreams Traps from Deck, GY, or banishment
Tribute to SS 2 non-Link Castle of Dreams monsters
